race.comment: SWEXAN (1) was allowed to drift back from an outside draw last time but found the line strongly to finish fourth over 1200m at this track. Well placed and the one to beat. HOT NOVA (11) was out of the money when resuming from a spell last start over 1000m at this track but is a likely improver with strong prospects. A LOT OF CLASS (2) was prominent at the turn and ran a better race last start to finish a close second over 1400m at this track after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Can go one better this time. SPACE ACE (3) returned from a spell two weeks ago when finishing sixth over 1200m at this track. Fitter this time and can play a more significant role.
